description_long: This is a tall, square-mouthed ceramic vase with gently flared sides and a flat base. The exterior is adorned with a detailed red botanical pattern featuring leafy branches and birds, set against a white background. The pattern is intricate and covers the entire visible surface, giving the vase a decorative and elegant appearance. The rim is slightly wider than the base, creating a subtle hourglass silhouette. The interior appears to be plain and unglazed, while the exterior has a smooth, possibly glossy finish. This vase would be suitable for holding flowers or as a standalone decorative piece in an urban environment.
description: A tall, square-mouthed ceramic vase with red botanical patterns on a white background and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full red botanical pattern and the square, flared mouth of the vase.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, highlighting the continuous pattern and the vase's symmetrical shape.
description_view_2: Another side view, mirroring the previous ones, with the same decorative motif and flared rim.
description_view_3: Back view, visually indistinguishable from the front and sides, maintaining the consistent pattern and form.
attribute_pattern: botanical motifs with birds and branches
